---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working correctly
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Start the game with `npm start`
2. Do '...'
3. See error / wrong behavior

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots or console output
If applicable, paste any error messages or add screenshots.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 10, macOS 14]
- Node version: [e.g. run `node --version`]
- npm version: [e.g. run `npm --version`]

## Additional context
Any other details that might help (GPU, Electron version from package.json, etc.).
